tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Might Have.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Might Have का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: He might have gone, but I am not sure. She might have heard this. They might have agreed with me. He might have reached there. She might have forgotten me.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Might Have.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Might Have का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: We might have thought wrong. They might have changed this plan. He might have known about this. She might not have seen this. We might have gone the wrong way.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "शायद उसने कुछ छिपाया होगा।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "He mights have reached there."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Might Have.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Might Have का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: They might have helped me. He might have broken the promise. She might have already known. We might have made a mistake.
